title: CirrusTracker
description: A companion mod for the Cirrus guild on Wynncraft. Bridges guild chat with Discord, tracks raids and aspects.
body:
# CirrusTracker 

CirrusTracker is a client-side Fabric mod built for members of the "Cirrus" guild on Wynncraft. It connects to a private server to provide real-time communication and tracking tools for the guild. 

## Features

### Guild Chat - Discord Bridge
Read and participate in guild chat from Discord, even when you're not in-game. Messages sent in-game appear in a Discord channel, and messages sent in Discord appear in-game.

### Raid Tracking
Automatically tracks raid completions across the guild. Sees whos running raids and keep a shared log of raid activity.

### Aspect Tracking
Tracks aspect drops for guild members. Keep an eye on what aspects have been found and by whom. 

### Account Linking
Link your Minecraft account to your Discord account through a simple verification process. This powers features like showing your Discord name alongside in-game messages.

## Requirements
- Fabric Loader for Minecraft 1.21.4 or 1.21.11
- Fabric API
- To be in "Cirrus" guild on Wynncraft

  ## Setup
 1. Install the mod like any other Fabric mod
 2. Join Wynncraft - the mod will automatically connect and authenticate
 3. Link your Discrod account using the /link command in the guild Discord server

  ## Note
This mod is designed exclusively for Cirrus guild members. You must be a member of the guild for the mod to function, as it verifies guild membership when you connect.
